content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Entrances at Madison Square Garden

  - url: https://www.msg.com/madison-square-garden/entrances

  - source: Madison Square Garden

  - domain: msg.com


  ## Content


  ## Entrance Options


  The Madison Square Garden entrance page presents a venue map showing general entrance
  points around The Garden. The map includes entrance options on the north, south,
  east, and west sides of the arena, together with VIP entrance points.


  Guests are directed to review the map when considering entrance options for an event
  at The Garden.


  ## CLEAR Entry


  The page also promotes a CLEAR lane for faster entry. Guests using CLEAR are directed
  to the CLEAR lane at the 8th Avenue Chase Entrances B and C.


  The CLEAR information is presented as a separate expedited-entry option on the entrance
  page.

  '
metadata: {}
title: Entrances at Madison Square Garden
url: https://www.msg.com/madison-square-garden/entrances

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Madison Square Garden FAQs | MSG | Official Site

  - url: https://www.msg.com/madison-square-garden/faqs

  - source: Madison Square Garden

  - domain: msg.com


  ## Content


  ## Entering The Garden


  Madison Square Garden''s FAQ explains that a guest''s digital ticket contains information
  about which entrance to use based on the guest''s seating location. Guests are asked
  to use the recommended entrance shown with their ticket and to follow signage around
  The Garden to locate that entrance.


  The FAQ also points guests to the venue''s separate entrance-options page for current
  entrance information.


  ## Digital Tickets


  Digital tickets need to be presented on a smartphone for entry and should be downloaded
  before arriving at the venue. More than one ticket may be displayed on a single
  device for a group.


  Guests should make sure the ticket is available on the phone they plan to use at
  entry.


  ## Arrive Early and Travel Light


  Madison Square Garden asks guests to arrive early and travel light. Bags do not
  have to be clear, but they must fit comfortably under the seat. Oversized bags larger
  than 22 inches by 14 inches by 9 inches are prohibited.


  The venue does not provide a place to check bags, coats, or other personal belongings.
  Guests with additional needs are directed to Guest Relations for assistance.


  ## Entry Preparation


  Before approaching an entrance, guests should check the digital ticket available
  on their phone for the entrance information associated with their seating location.
  Around the venue, guests should use posted signage to locate the recommended entrance.

  '
metadata: {}
title: Madison Square Garden FAQs | MSG | Official Site
url: https://www.msg.com/madison-square-garden/faqs

I checked your event and Madison Square Garden’s official guidance:

- **Event:** Neon Atlas Live — August 22, 2026 at 8:00 PM  
- **Ticket:** Standard, non-premium  
- **Assigned entrance:** No specific entrance is currently listed in your ticket information.

MSG says the **digital ticket normally recommends an entrance based on your seating location**. Before you leave, open the ticket on your phone and check for that recommendation, then follow the venue signage.

If no entrance appears, use any **general entrance** shown on MSG’s venue map. The **8th Avenue Chase Entrances B and C are specifically for CLEAR expedited entry**, so use those only if you have CLEAR.
